summary: Completed frontend testing for header alignment fix across Dashboard, Cards, and Insights pages on both desktop and mobile viewports. All headers now correctly display left-aligned logos/back buttons and right-aligned notification bells/logout buttons.
passed_tests: Dashboard header - Logo 'Project Atlas' is LEFT-aligned (x=24px on desktop, x=16px on mobile)
Dashboard header - Logout button is RIGHT-aligned (24px from right edge on desktop, 16px on mobile)
Dashboard header - Notification bell is RIGHT-aligned
Cards page header - Back arrow is LEFT-aligned (x=24px on desktop, x=16px on mobile)
Cards page header - Logo 'Project Atlas' is LEFT-aligned next to back button
Cards page header - Notification bell is RIGHT-aligned (24px from right edge on desktop, 16px on mobile)
Insights page header - Back button and logo are LEFT-aligned (x=24px on desktop, x=16px on mobile)
Insights page header - Notification bell and logout button are RIGHT-aligned (24px from right edge on desktop, 16px on mobile)
Mobile viewport (390px) - All headers maintain proper left-right alignment
Desktop viewport (1920px) - All headers maintain proper left-right alignment
